violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door Traulsen. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The area underneath the dishwasher has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door traulsen. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The handle on the milk case was observed in poor condition. Equipment must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
The milk case in the kitchen and the freezer in the kitchen was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2024

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria door 5 is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

The floor in the kitchen and closet in the cafeteria has soil residue and pest droppings present. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrective Action - Establishment must clean floor as often as needed to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was at 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Water was added to sanitizer to reach proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Large milk cold hold is not in good repair. Duct tape observed covering a section of jagged metal. Duct tape is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Milk cooler is to be repaired using proper materials. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023
3-bay sink is not holding water/sanitizer and must be repaired for proper sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The wall behind the 3-bay sink is in poor repair. There are 2 sections with holes and exposed concrete. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
